name: apx-standard
description: APX — APDS Parking eXtensions: an open companion standard to APDS 4.1 adding data push/pull profiles, control, alerts, discovery, accounts/payments, LPR, reservations, permits, and tolling.

scripts.spec:bundle: redocly bundle spec/openapi/apx.yaml --config tools/redocly.yaml -o spec/dist/apx-v1.yaml && redocly bundle spec/openapi/apx.yaml --config tools/redocly.yaml -o spec/dist/apx-v1.json
scripts.typegen: npm run spec:bundle && npm run typegen -w packages/types
scripts.test: npm run vendor:check && npm run spec:lint && npm run spec:bundle && npm run spec:style && npm test --workspaces --if-present
